word: H2050 - הָתַת - hâthath - haw-thath' - Imagine mischief

sections.paragraph:
Original: התת

Transliteration: hâthath

Phonetic: haw-thath'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Poel) to shout at, be frantic at, assail, break in, overwhelm, imagine mischief

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 488

Part(s) of speech: Verb
